name: Connector Request

labels: connector, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## System / Platform

**Name:** <!-- e.g. SAP TM, Oracle TMS, Transporeon, project44, Freightos, ... -->

**Vendor / Product:** <!-- Company name and exact product name -->

**Category:**
- [ ] TMS (Transportation Management System)
- [ ] Carrier / Tracking API
- [ ] Freight Marketplace / Exchange
- [ ] ERP / Finance Integration
- [ ] Port / Customs Authority
- [ ] Other: ___

## API / Integration Details

**API Documentation:** <!-- Link to public API docs, if available -->

**Authentication type:** <!-- OAuth2 / API key / HMAC / EDI / other -->

**API style:** <!-- REST / SOAP / GraphQL / EDI (EDIFACT, X12) / Webhook -->

**Data available:**
- [ ] Shipment status / tracking
- [ ] Rate quotes
- [ ] Booking
- [ ] Documents (BOL, POD, invoices)
- [ ] Carrier master data
- [ ] Other: ___

## Your Use Case

<!-- Describe how you'd use this connector. Which ATLAS tools would it power? -->

## Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] Yes — I can build this connector (I'm a developer)
- [ ] Yes — I can help with testing / provide access to a sandbox
- [ ] No — but I'd use it if built

## Priority / Impact

<!-- How many companies would benefit from this connector? Any urgency? -->
